name: Lowest Star
descs:
When hitting an enemy with a Blunt Skill or a Pride Affinity Skill, inflict 2 fixed SP damage on target.

Allies with less than 0 SP deal +10% damage.

When hitting an enemy with a Blunt Skill or a Pride Affinity Skill, inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">3 fixed SP damage on target</style>.

Allies with less than 0 SP deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+15% damage</style>.

When hitting an enemy with a Blunt Skill or a Pride Affinity Skill, inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">5 fixed SP damage on target</style>.

Allies with less than 0 SP deal +<style="upgradeHighlight">25% damage</style>.
